title: Merge Sort
description:
Implement **merge sort**. Given an array of numbers, return a new sorted array in ascending order.

Merge sort is a divide-and-conquer algorithm: split the array in half, recursively sort each half, then merge the sorted halves together.

**Example:**
```
nums = [5, 2, 3, 1]
Result = [1, 2, 3, 5]
```
hints: Divide the array in half, sort each half, then merge.
The merge step: compare elements from both halves, take the smaller one.
Base case: array of 0 or 1 elements is already sorted.
